---
name: Gap or extension
about: A missing model/factor/domain/method, or a proposed extension beyond the atlas
title: "[gap] <short description>"
labels: ["gap", "research", "phase-0"]
---

## The gap / extension
<!-- What's missing or worth adding: a factor, coupling, domain, paradigm, engine,
     dataset, or method (data assimilation, causal inference, surrogate, ML/hybrid…). -->

## Why it matters (grounded)
<!-- The validity or synergy improvement expected, with primary-source citations.
     Scope is a floor, not a ceiling — but every extension needs a cited reason. -->

## Feeds back into the atlas
<!-- If accepted, the new dossier/method/engine page (and its maturity tier) plus the
     graph.json node(s)/edge(s) it adds. The knowledge base grows WITH the ensemble. -->

## Decision path
- [ ] ADR drafted in `docs/decisions/`
- [ ] Justified against alternatives
- [ ] Test / tournament defined before implementation
